item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval:
item.description: Reminding all Specialist High Skills Major Students who are attending the First Aid and CPR Training with Mrs. Longval today - to please report to the library ASAP.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval
item.description: Reminding ALL Varsity Track and Field Athletes today's practice takes place at Russell High School. Please make sure you wear layers, fill up your water bottle - gather as a group and walk over to meet Mr. and Mrs. Longval at the track. Attendance will be taken at 2:40pm and practice will go until 3:45pm Dismissal takes place at Russell high - so please make arrangements with parents and guardians.

item.title: A message from: Mrs. Longval
item.description: Reminding all CrossFit Athletes - today is our last practice before our competition this Thursday. Please meet Mrs. Longval in the weight room at 2:15pm

item.title: A message from Ms. Montgomery.
item.description: The first two varsity baseball tryouts will be Wednesday and Thursday this week after school. Please see me for your Athlete Participation form if you have not handed yours in.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: This Thursday the Costa Rica service team will host a bake sale with the help of our friends 7C and 7D! Remember to bring your money this Thursday in support of our service team!
